nasb.text: So David sent ten young men; and David said to the young men, “Go up to Carmel, visit Nabal and greet him in my name;

esv.text: So David sent ten young men. And David said to the young men, “Go up to Carmel, and go to Nabal and greet him in my name.

cnv.text: 就差派十個僕人，對他們說：“你們上迦密去見拿八，以我的名義向他問安。

ccb.text: 就派十个部下到迦密去见拿八，吩咐他们以他的名义向拿八问安，
